data.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $85,000 Ahead Of Trump Tariff Announcement
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is up to $85,500 as market observers and analysts debate the impact of Wednesday’s tariff announcements.

data.title: $100 Invested In Valero Energy 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Why Edgewise Therapeutics (EWTX) Stock Is Falling
data.description: Edgewise Therapeutics shares are trading lower by 25.7% during Wednesday's session. The company announced an approximate $200 million offering.

data.title: What's Going On With Waton Financial Stock?
data.description: Waton Financial Ltd (NASDAQ:WTF) shares are trading lower Wednesday, pulling back after rallying nearly 400% following the company's IPO this week.

data.title: Waste Management Invests Big In Smarter, Cleaner Recycling Across Major US Cities
data.description: WM announced openings of four new recycling and renewable natural gas facilities as part of its $3B sustainability initiative. Earth Month brings $323M in new/upgraded facilities with advanced technology and increased capacity.
